page.title: Projects
page.subtitle: Open-source components, vulnerabilities, and license risk.

toolbar.search_placeholder: Search by name or git URL

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.subtitle: Register your first repository to start scanning.

create.title: New Project
create.scan_hint: This registers the project. After creating it, start a scan (and pick source / container, upload, and a release label) from the project page or the project list.
create.git_url_hint: Optional. Leave empty to upload a .zip or a folder when you run a scan. HTTPS, SSH (git@host:…), and git+ssh URLs are accepted; a private repo needs credentials embedded in the URL.
create.no_team: You are not a member of any team yet, so you cannot create a project. Ask an administrator to add you to a team.
create.error_name_max: Name must be 100 characters or less
create.error_description_max: Description must be 500 characters or less
create.error_git_url_invalid: Enter a valid repository URL (https://, ssh://, git@host:…, or git+ssh://)
create.error_default_branch_invalid: Branch names may use letters, numbers, and . _ / - only

severity_card.title: Vulnerability severity
severity_card.subtitle: Components grouped by their highest CVE severity across all accessible projects.

license_card.title: License classification
license_card.subtitle: Components grouped by license category across all accessible projects.
